channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Donchitos /Claude-Code-Game-Studios | Shell | N/A
item.description: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

item.title: google /magika | Python | N/A
item.description: Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection

item.title: lsdefine /GenericAgent | Python | N/A
item.description: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption

item.title: vercel-labs /open-agents | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An open source template for building cloud agents.

item.title: public-apis /public-apis | Python | N/A
item.description: A collective list of free APIs

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: chrislgarry /Apollo-11 | Assembly | N/A
item.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: Lordog /dive-into-llms | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: 《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程

item.title: thedotmack /claude-mem | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

item.title: forrestchang /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
